metaDescription: DeepSeek-R1-0528 (DeepSeek), released 2025-05-28 — part of the DeepSeek R1 line. Major R1 upgrade with deeper reasoning and fewer hallucinations (AIME 70.0 to…
overview: DeepSeek-R1-0528 is a large language model from DeepSeek, part of the DeepSeek R1 line. Released 2025-05-28. First-generation reasoning line built on the V3 backbone with large-scale reinforcement learning, exposing chain-of-thought; open-weight under MIT.
What's notable in this version: Major R1 upgrade with deeper reasoning and fewer hallucinations (AIME 70.0 to 87.5).
